publishedAbstract: - The noobaa-operator pod is in CLBO with this error: ~~~ # oc describe pod noobaa-operator-858755cd85-cmg78 Events: Type Reason Age From Message------------------------- Warning BackOff 3m20s (x2709 over 14h) kubelet Back-off restarting failed container objectstorage-provisioner-sidecar in pod noobaa-operator-858755cd85-cmg78_openshift-storage(fdea37b5-bca5-45f2-92ae-b777ee63236b) ~~~- In addition, MGC may appears as installing: ~~~ mcg-operator.v4.14.10-rhodf NooBaa Operator 4.14.10-rhodf mcg-operator.v4.14.9-rhodf Installing ocs ~~~ NOTE. In this particular case this was observed after ODF upgrade from 4.14.9 to 4.14.10
publishedTitle: ODF 4.14 noobaa-operator pod in CLBO : Back-off restarting failed container objectstorage-provisioner-sidecar
